inputs.label: Discharge Coefficient (C)
inputs.businessContext: Discharge coefficient accounting for flow contraction and friction losses, typically 0.6-0.7 for orifice plates.

businessContext_i18n.en: Discharge coefficient accounting for flow contraction and friction losses, typically 0.6-0.7 for orifice plates.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Akış daralması ve sürtünme kayıplarını hesaba katan deşarj katsayısı, orifis plakaları için tipik olarak 0.6-0.7.

inputs.label: Orifice Area (A)
inputs.businessContext: Cross-sectional area of the orifice or restriction.

businessContext_i18n.en: Cross-sectional area of the orifice or restriction.

inputs.label: Fluid Density (ρ)
inputs.businessContext: Density of the fluid. For water at 20°C, 998 kg/m³.

businessContext_i18n.en: Density of the fluid. For water at 20°C, 998 kg/m³.

inputs.label: Pressure Difference (ΔP)
inputs.businessContext: Differential pressure across the orifice, measured in Pascals.

businessContext_i18n.en: Differential pressure across the orifice, measured in Pascals.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Orifis boyunca diferansiyel basınç, Pascal cinsinden ölçülür.

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
